title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Motilal Oswal - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Motilal Oswal - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Motilal Oswal in Lucknow is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Motilal Oswal:
Motilal Oswal is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Motilal Oswal!
